name: tyche
description: Tyche — a self-hosted single-user YNAB-style envelope-budgeting app. Modular monolith per ADR-001.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tyche/shared && npm run build -w @tyche/server && npm run build -w @tyche/web
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @tyche/server & npm run dev -w @tyche/web & wait
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tyche/shared && npm run test -w @tyche/server && npm run test -w @tyche/web
